habitat: Central Chile sclerophyll forests; related use in neighboring regions.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional South American digestive bitter for liver/gallbladder discomfort traditions.
activeCompounds: Boldine (aporphine alkaloid), essential oil (ascaridole traces possible), flavonoids
cautions: Not for bile duct obstruction or severe liver disease self-care. Essential oil not for internal use. Professional advice.
historicalNotes: Mapuche and Chilean folk medicine heritage.
habitatDe: Central Chile sclerophyll Wälder; related use in neighboring regions.

cautionsDe: Not für bile duct obstruction oder severe liver disease self-care. Ätherisches Öl not für innere Anwendung. Fachlicher Rat.
